name: Greta Thunberg: A Year to Change the World
original_name: Greta Thunberg: A Year to Change the World
overview: This revealing series follows environmental activist Greta Thunberg as she seeks to raise awareness of the accelerating climate change and spread her message, that we must act to drastically reduce our carbon emissions.

trailers.title: Greta Thunberg: A Year to Change the World | Trailer - BBC Trailers
